[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001101 4
1 110101000 4
2 000010001 2
3 100000000 1
4 100000001 2
5 011001110 5
6 111111000 6
7 000101100 3

01 10 111111100 7
12 21 001101101 5
23 32 111101101 7
34 43 110111001 6
45 54 100010001 3
56 65 100000001 2 match 4
67 76 111001111 7
70 07 111111110 8

02 20 111111101 8
13 31 110101100 5
24 42 001011101 5
35 53 110101000 4 match 1
46 64 100010001 3
57 75 111001110 6
60 06 111111001 7
71 17 011101110 6

61 16 100101101 5
72 27 011001111 6

37 73 111101110 7
